sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_ce3e5d15_d503_47b7_bf87_ce214731fcb5" (

    "name" TEXT,

    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_ce3e5d15_d503_47b7_bf87_ce214731fcb5" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_ce3e5d15d50347b7_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
